title: Introduction Quiz 🏆
description: Show you are ready for the next level!

questions.question: What is the main purpose of JavaScript on a website?
questions.explanation: JavaScript is the language of interactivity on the web.

questions.question: Which specific command prints text to the screen for debugging?
True or False: 'Hello' is a String (text).
questions.explanation: Yes, text wrapped in quotes is called a String.

questions.question: To write a comment, use two slashes: __
questions.explanation: Two forward slashes `//` start a single-line comment.

questions.question: Which of these is a Number?
questions.explanation: 99 is a raw number. The others are strings or text.

questions.question: Where does JavaScript run by default?
questions.explanation: Browsers have a built-in JavaScript engine.

questions.question: True or False: console.log('5' + '5') will output 10.
questions.explanation: It will output '55' because they are strings, not numbers! It joins them together.

questions.question: Which symbol is used for multiplication?
questions.explanation: The asterisk `*` is the multiplication operator.

questions.question: To group multiple arguments in console.log, separate them with a ___
Does `// Comment` affect how the code runs?
questions.explanation: Comments are completely ignored by the computer during execution.
